items.briefing:
A ransom has reportedly been paid to hackers who disrupted online learning services in Australia, highlighting the real threat ransomware poses to the education sector — directly relevant to registered training organisations like ours. Separately, a new CyberCX report found that 29% of security tests revealed severe vulnerabilities in Australian organisations, and AI is fuelling a sharp rise in phishing attacks, making scam emails increasingly convincing and harder to spot.

**Practical tip:** Be extra cautious with unexpected emails asking you to click links or enter credentials — AI-generated phishing messages can look very convincing. When in doubt, verify directly with the sender.
